title: stachys tmolea
intro: Stachys tmolea, also known as Hedge Woundwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used to treat wounds, cuts, and skin irritations due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's medicinal properties make it beneficial for soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and alleviating cold and flu symptoms. The herbal preparations of Stachys tmolea include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its health benefits.
